message:
SQL 執行失敗: SimpleDB Execution Error: IO Error: Could not set lock on file "/home/daniel/ai-box/datalake-system/data/warehouse/tiptop_jp.duckdb": Conflicting lock is held in /usr/bin/python3.12 (PID 2488884) by user daniel. See also https://duckdb.org/docs/stable/connect/concurrency
SQL: SELECT status, workstation, SUM(scrap_qty) AS total_scrap
FROM mart_work_order_wide
GROUP BY status, workstation
ORDER BY total_scrap DESC
LIMIT 100

details.sql:
SELECT status, workstation, SUM(scrap_qty) AS total_scrap
FROM mart_work_order_wide
GROUP BY status, workstation
ORDER BY total_scrap DESC
LIMIT 100
